name: Perspective Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: Perspective Therapeutics, Inc. (CATX) is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on targeted alpha therapy (TAT) for cancer treatment. Its pipeline includes VMT-α-NET and VMT01 product candidates, which have received Fast Track designation from the FDA. The company also develops PSV359, a novel asset under an IND application. Perspective operates manufacturing subsidiaries Viewpoint Molecular Targeting, Inc. and Isoray Medical, Inc., and is building a regional network of drug product finishing facilities.
